downstream_consumers: Lloyd context enrichment in create-workorder / execute-workorder

risks.title: populate-coderef overwrites .coderef/ artifacts on feature branch
risks.mitigation: These are regenerable artifacts. Overwrite is expected and desired on the feature branch.

risks.title: RAG query returns no hits — semantic_context empty
risks.mitigation: If no hits, report the empty result with details on why (vector count, embedding shape, query). Negative result is still a valid finding.

risks.title: CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG=1 requires Lloyd to be reachable
risks.mitigation: Check Lloyd/rag-server status before query. If unavailable, report the infrastructure state and fallback result.

candidates.change: Repopulated with @semantic metadata from source-headers-dogfood branch
Rebuilt from enriched graph via rag-index

dependencies: Lloyd / coderef-rag-server (must be reachable for step 3)

decision_records.decision: Run as light plan — validation only, no source code changes
decision_records.rationale: This is a dogfood e2e smoke test of the --source-headers pipeline. No logic modification is in scope.
